title_en: Lemon Love: How to Boost Iron Absorption
title_es: Amor por el Limón: Mejora tu Absorción de Hierro
hook_en: Did you know lemons can supercharge your iron intake?
hook_es: ¿Sabías que los limones pueden potenciar tu ingesta de hierro?
key_message: Squeezing lemon juice on spinach or beans can increase iron absorption by up to 6 times.
visual_elements: close-up of a juicy lemon being sliced
demonstration of squeezing lemon juice over spinach salad
animated text overlay showing '6x more iron!' as lemon juice drips
split-screen before-and-after graphic of iron absorption levels
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Lemon — High in vitamin C and citric acid — boosts iron absorption from plant foods (Tip: Squeeze lemon on spinach/beans to increase iron absorption by up to 6x)

title_en: The Power of Vitamin C: Lemon Edition
title_es: El Poder de la Vitamina C: Edición Limón
hook_en: Want to get the most out of your meals? Meet the mighty lemon!
hook_es: ¿Quieres aprovechar al máximo tus comidas? ¡Conoce al poderoso limón!
key_message: Lemon's vitamin C content not only boosts immunity but also enhances iron absorption from plant foods.
visual_elements: a vibrant lemon being zested and juiced
overlay of lemons with animated vitamin C molecules
demonstration of adding lemon juice to a bean dish
text overlay 'Boost Your Meal Power!' with energetic graphics
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Lemon — High in vitamin C and citric acid — boosts iron absorption from plant foods (Tip: Squeeze lemon on spinach/beans to increase iron absorption by up to 6x)
